name: Hot Tomato Relish (Gujarati Kasundi)
recipeIngredient: Ripe tomatoes (5 medium, blanched and chopped)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the vegetable oil in a medium-size skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Add mustard seeds and garlic. Cook, stirring, until the mixture starts to brown, about 4 minutes.
3. Add turmeric, cayenne pepper, and salt. Stir and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
4. Add the chopped tomatoes and stir to combine. Cook until thickened, about 10 minutes.
5. Stir in the vinegar and bring the mixture to a boil.
6. Reduce heat, cover, and simmer until thickened again.
7. Spoon the relish into clean jars and seal.
Makes 3/4 cup.
Note: Stays fresh for several weeks in a covered jar in the refrigerator.
